title: Boat HUD (from F1 2023)
body:
## I need your help
Currently, mod is in beta. If you find any bugs, please report them on [Github](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-f1/issues)

## Overview
Boat HUD is a client-side mod for Fabric that recreates hud indicators from F1 2023. Every indicator can be moved or disabled. Additionally, adds some advanced features to make boat racing more enjoyable. Usually use it with [Subaru Impreza resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/boat-subaru-impreza)

![Overview](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-f1/blob/main/overview.gif?raw=true)

## Indicators
At the moment, there are four different indicators: speedometer, map, race status and leaderboard. You can choose their positions and rendering as you want

![Indicators](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-f1/blob/main/indicators.gif?raw=true)

## Race mode (Boatlabs, Frosthex, BRWC only)
### Modes change automatically
- Speedometer (speed in km/h, speed in ice types, drift angle, position, pits, WASD keystrokes)
- Map (track in "3d", players in boats)
- Leaderboard (your laps, pos, team color, name, pits, interval for each player)

![Race mode](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-f1/blob/main/race_low.png?raw=true)

## Time-trial/Qualifications mode (Boatlabs, Frosthex, BRWC only)
### Modes change automatically
- Speedometer (speed in km/h, speed in ice types, drift angle, position, WASD keystrokes)
- Map (track in "3d", players in boats)
- Race Status (current lap time)
- Leaderboard (leader time, pos, team color, name, best lap for each player)

![Time trial mode](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-f1/blob/main/time_low.png?raw=true)

## Session mode (Boatlabs, Frosthex, BRWC only)
### Modes change automatically
- Speedometer (speed in km/h, speed in ice types, drift angle, WASD keystrokes)
- Map (track in "3d", players in boats)
- Race Status (current lap time)
- Leaderboard (your previous laps)

![Session mode](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-f1/blob/main/session_low.png?raw=true)

## Single-player mode (in single-player or non-boat servers)
- Speedometer (speed in km/h, speed in ice types, drift angle, WASD keystrokes)
- Map (track in "3d", players in boats)

![Single-player mode](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-f1/blob/main/single_low.png?raw=true)

## Broadcast/Spectator mode (disabled by default)
### To use this mod allow it in settings and press special key
- Leaderboard during race (laps, pos, team color, name, pits, interval for each player)
- Leaderboard during time-trial/qualifications (leader time, pos, team color, name, best lap for each player)

![Single-player mode](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-f1/blob/main/spec_low.png?raw=true)

## Advanced settings
As I said, there are 6 advanced settings to change default minecraft hud when you is boating:
- Move chat above the map
- Move health and hunger bars to the down side of screen
- Render default scoreboard
- Render default overlay (text stroke above the hotbar)
- Render hotbar and xp level
- Render health and hunger bars

![Advanced settings](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-f1/blob/main/settings.png?raw=true)

## Dependencies
This mod is based on Fabric, so you need [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). I suggest to use [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) to configure the mod

## Credits
Based on the [BoatHud](https://modrinth.com/mod/boathud) by Hibi, specifically it's way to render hud indicators
